untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking implied volatility (IV) change from entry level and option leg profit percentage (15% gain). These are derivatives/relative metrics not available in the allowed indicator set. hvol_20 (historical volatility) is used as a proxy for volatility environment, but cannot measure: (1) IV specifically vs historical vol, (2) entry-level IV baseline for comparison, (3) option leg P&L as percentage of initial premium. The signal also requires simultaneous exit of two correlated legs (futures + options) which requires position tracking beyond price-based indicators.
translation_notes: This is a volatility-based exit rule for an existing hedge position. The core logic—exit when volatility has risen sufficiently to lock profits—maps conceptually to hvol_20 > threshold, but the original signal's dependency on implied volatility (not historical), entry-point baseline tracking, and option premium accounting makes precise translation impossible without custom position state variables.
